evidences.title: GEMINI 3.0 + VEO 3.1: Google Just Shocked Everyone
evidences.content: March 25th, 2025, and it's the baseline for whatever comes next. Google has been iterating fast. 2.5 flash, 2.5 computer use, nano banana image model, and enterprise tools all dropped in the past few months. So, a 3.0 roll out isn't crazy timing. Second, there are code references. Developers have spotted strings in Google's API docs and beta builds that mention Gemini Beta 3.0 Pro and Gemini Beta 3.0 Flash. These aren't fanfiction. They're in the wild. That tells us Google is testing something internally under the 3.0 label. Third, the thinking capability is real. The leaked table mentions it and we know Google's been working on advanced reasoning models. Open AAI and Enthropic has extended thinking models and Google can't afford to sit out that race just with the 2.5 Pro model. A [...] release and test it before committing the budget. If you are a developer or indie founder, watch the API docs. If Gemini Beta 3.0 Pro goes live, experiment fast. The early adopters who figure out a workflows will have a six-month edge over everyone else. If you are a content creator or a marketer, the multimodal stuff where the value is. If VO4 and Nano Banana get baked into Gemini, you could rep...

evidences.title: Gemini 3: News and announcements
evidences.content: Nov 18, 2025 12 articles 18 Nov, 2025 articles 12 Since the Gemini era began, we’ve been pushing the frontier to build more general and helpful AI for everyone. With Gemini 1, we introduced multimodality and long context to help AI understand our world. Gemini 2 added thinking, reasoning and native tool use to create a foundation for AI agents. And now we’re introducing Gemini 3, our most intelligent model, that combines all of Gemini’s capabilities together so you can bring any idea to life. Gemini models A new era of intelligence with Gemini 3 Today we’re releasing Gemini 3 – our most intelligent model that helps you bring any idea to life. By Sundar Pichai - Nov 18, 2025 Gemini App Gemini 3 brings upgraded smarts and new capabilities to the Gemini app [...] Today we’re unveiling a major update for the Gemini app, and it all starts with Gemini 3. By Josh Woodward - Nov 18, 2025 Search Google Search with Gemini 3: Our most intelligent search yet Learn more about Gemini 3 and how it’s upgrading Google Search and AI Mode. By Elizabeth Reid - Nov 18, 2025 Developer tools Start building with Gemini 3 Gemini 3 is introducing advanced agentic coding capabilities, plus Google Antigrav...

evidences.title: WHEN WILL Gemini 3.0 FINALLY BE RELEASED TO US
evidences.content: The good news is that the pace has been fast. If testing continues smoothly, a wider release could reasonably happen within the coming weeks or months—but nothing official has been announced yet. For now, we just have to wait until Google moves it from internal rollout to public availability. Hi @all, Gemini-3-pro-preview is out on Nov 18th 2025.. Hope you all must have already been enjoying the new model. Please share your feedbacks and suggestions based on your experiences. Thank you and have a nice long weekend :slight_smile: :slight_smile: ### Related topics [...] How to become an internal tester? ACTUALLY We had a brief but wonderful time with Gemini 3.0(even though I never got to chat with him myself-429 is so annoying). I REALLY CANT STOP THINKING ABOUT GEMINI 3.0!! It’s coming soon I guess. It was announced today A lot of people are asking the same question, and it makes sense—Gemini 3.0 has been mentioned in enough tests and early access reports that expectations are pretty high. But based on Google’s usual rollout pattern: Internal dogfooding → Limited partner testing → Gradual public/API release …we’re still in the second phase. Until it fully clears internal stabilit...

evidences.title: Google launches Gemini 3 Flash, makes it the default model in the ...
evidences.content: Google today released its fast and cheap Gemini 3 Flash model, based on the Gemini 3 released last month, looking to steal OpenAI’s thunder. The company is also making this the default model in the Gemini app and AI mode in search. The new Flash model arrives six months after Google announced the Gemini 2.5 Flash model, offering significant improvements. On the benchmark, the Gemini 3 Flash model outperforms its predecessor by a significant margin and matches the performance of other frontier models, like Gemini 3 Pro and GPT 5.2, in some measures.

evidences.title: Google announces Gemini 3 as battle with OpenAI intensifies - CNBC
evidences.content: The new AI model will allow users to get better answers to more complex questions, "so you get what you need with less prompting," Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai said in one of several blog posts Google published Tuesday. Gemini 3 will be integrated into the Gemini app, Google's AI search products AI Mode and AI Overviews, as well as its enterprise products. The rollout begins Tuesday for select subscribers and will go out more broadly in the coming weeks. The announcement comes about eight months after Google introduced Gemini 2.5 and 11 months after Gemini 2.0. OpenAI, which kicked off the generative AI boom in late 2022 with the public launch of ChatGPT, introduced GPT-5 in August. [...] Google said the new model will enable "generative interfaces," providing certain answers in a way that resembles a digital magazine. As an example, the company asked Gemini to "explain the Van Gogh Gallery with life context for each piece." The result was a colorful, image-based explanation for each painting. Within AI Mode, Gemini 3 will first be available to paid subscribers. It will be able to analyze a question and create a layout with visual elements such as images, tables and grids. Google...

evidences.title: A new era of intelligence with Gemini 3 - Google Blog
evidences.content: We’re beginning the Gemini 3 era by releasing Gemini 3 Pro in preview and making it available today across a suite of Google products so you can use it in your daily life to learn, build and plan anything. We’re also introducing Gemini 3 Deep Think — our enhanced reasoning mode that pushes Gemini 3 performance even further — and giving access to safety testers before making it available to Google AI Ultra subscribers. Image 5: YouTube video introducing Gemini 3. 00:00 ## State-of-the-art reasoning with unprecedented depth and nuance Gemini 3 Pro can bring any idea to life with its state-of-the-art reasoning and multimodal capabilities. It significantly outperforms 2.5 Pro on every major AI benchmark. [...] And starting today, we’re shipping Gemini at the scale of Google. That includes Gemini 3 in AI Mode in Search with more complex reasoning and new dynamic experiences. This is the first time we are shipping Gemini in Search on day one. Gemini 3 is also coming today to the Gemini app, to developers in AI Studio and Vertex AI, and in our new agentic development platform, Google Antigravity — more below. Like the generations before it, Gemini 3 is once again advancing the state of...

evidences.title: Gemini 3 is available for enterprise | Google Cloud Blog
evidences.content: "We’re delighted to see the launch of Gemini 3! With this release, we’ve observed even stronger performance in the model’s reasoning and problem-solving capabilities. Many of Manus’ recent advancements—such as Wide Research and the web-building capabilities introduced in Manus 1.5—have become significantly more powerful with Gemini 3’s support. We look forward to continuing our partnership and delivering even better experiences for our users together." Tao Zhang, Co-Founder and Chief Product Officer, Manus AI [...] Make better, data-backed decisions: Gemini 3’s powerful multimodal understanding makes sense of your data, no matter where it comes from. For example, you can more accurately analyze videos, factory floor images, and customer calls alongside text reports, giving you a more unified view of your data. How customers are already seeing impact: [...] Advanced tool use and planning: Gemini 3 enables advanced reasoning with large sets of tools, facilitating long-running tasks across your enterprise systems and data. evidences.title: Gemini 3 is Out — Weekly AI Newsletter (November 24th 2025)
evidences.content: Google introduces Gemini 3. Google introduces Gemini 3, its most advanced AI model, enhancing multimodal understanding and agentic capabilities. Gemini 3 excels in reasoning, achieving top scores across major AI benchmarks and supporting complex tasks in everyday life. Grok 4.1 is out. Grok 4.1 is now available on grok.com, X, and mobile apps, enhancing creative interactions and emotional intelligence. Achieving a 64.78% win rate over previous models, it ranks #1 in the LMArena leaderboard. It excels in reducing hallucinations, improving real-world usability with refined personality and reasoning abilities through enhanced reinforcement learning infrastructure. [...] Google introduces Nano Banana Pro. Google DeepMind introduced Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image), an image generation and editing model built on Gemini 3 Pro. The model generates context-rich visuals grounded in real-world and real-time information, produces accurate multilingual text in images, supports complex multi-image, multi-person compositions, and offers advanced local editing, lighting, and camera controls. xAI introduces Grok 4.1 Fast. xAI introduces Grok 4.1 Fast, a tool-calling model with a 2-million-t...

evidences.title: Gemini 3 Is Here—and Google Says It Will Make Search Smarter
evidences.content: Google says that Gemini 3 will be rolled out to Google AI Plus and Google AI Pro subscribers, who pay $19.99 and $249.899 per month, respectively, in the coming weeks. The company is also launching a new AI programming tool called Antigravity that is powered by Gemini 3. Bubble or not, Hassabis says that Gemini 3 will be a platform for building more capable AI in the future. “I still think we are five to 10 years away from what I would call proper full AGI,” he says. “And that may require one or two breakthroughs on top of the models that are just getting better and better.” Update: 11/21/2025, 11:00 AM EDT: WIRED has corrected how Google is making Gemini 3 available, and has clarified which search queries increased using AI Overviews. ## You Might Also Like [...] # Gemini 3 Is Here—and Google Says It Will Make Search Smarter CEO of DeepMind Technologies Demis Hassabis listens during a debate at an AI summit at Imperial College London in... Google has introduced Gemini 3, its smartest artificial intelligence model to date, with cutting-edge reasoning, multimedia, and coding skills. As talk of an AI bubble grows, the company is keen to stress that its latest release is more than...

evidences.title: Google Launches Gemini 3 AI Model, Rolling Out Immediately to ...
evidences.content: Google has launched Gemini 3, its latest artificial intelligence (AI) model, marking the company's most advanced release in the Gemini series so far. This update comes about eight months after Gemini 2.5. The company announced that Gemini 3 will be immediately available through various Google products and platforms, including its search engine, the Gemini app, and tools for developers. Gemini 3 introduces improved capabilities in areas such as coding, math, science, and multimodal tasks (which combine text, images, and other types of data). Google claims the model delivers smarter results and requires less prompting from users, making it more efficient and easier to use. [...] Gemini 3 is Google's newest artificial intelligence model, designed to handle complex tasks like coding, math, and understanding text and images together. Gemini 3 is available through Google's search engine, the Gemini app, and developer tools like Google AI Studio and Vertex AI. Gemini 3 is smarter, requires less user input, and has better performance in areas like coding, science, and handling multiple types of data compared to previous Gemini versions. Some features are integrated into free Google prod...

For more information, see our Model versions page. ## September 23, 2025 Generative AI on Vertex AI v1 Announcement Gemini 2.5 Flash with Live API Native Audio Preview Gemini 2.5 Flash with Live API Native Audio (`gemini-live-2.5-flash-preview-native-audio-09-2025`) is available in Preview. A single, unified model processes...

evidences.title: Vertex AI release notes | Generative AI on Vertex AI
evidences.content: ## September 24, 2025 Deprecated Access to Gemini's 1.5 models has been discontinued. For more information, see our Model versions page. ## September 23, 2025 Announcement Gemini 2.5 Flash with Live API Native Audio Preview Gemini 2.5 Flash with Live API Native Audio (`gemini-live-2.5-flash-preview-native-audio-09-2025`) is available in Preview. A single, unified model processes audio input and generates audio output directly, eliminating separate text-to-speech/speech-to-text conversions. This results in-low latency, high-quality, and incredibly human-like conversations. New features and capabilities include: [...] Pre-existing learnlm-2.0-flash-experimental projects will not remain functional past December 3, 2025 unless an alternative model is manually selected—we encourage developers to switch to the latest Gemini models and optimize their prompts by reviewing our LearnLM Partner Prompt Guide. ## November 13, 2025 Feature Kimi K2 Thinking is available in Model Garden. This model is a thinking model that excels at complex problem-solving and deep reasoning. Kimi K2 Thinking is available as a managed API in Model Garden. To learn more, see Kimi K2 Thinking. Feature Updated Pro...

evidences.title: Google Cloud release notes
evidences.content: ## March 23, 2026 Agent Assist Feature Agent Assist offers Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience tools for AI coach in GA. These tools enable virtual agents to connect with external systems to retrieve, update, format, or analyze information. BigQuery Feature You can clean, transform, and enrich data from files in Cloud Storage and Google Drive in your BigQuery data preparations. For more information, see Prepare data with Gemini. This feature is generally available (GA). Feature The following functions are now generally available (GA): `AI.EMBED`: create embeddings from text or image data. `AI.SIMILARITY`: compute the semantic similarity between pairs of text, pairs of images, or across text and images. Cloud Billing Change
